root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as memname, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) as age_mem
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename ,sc_mem_m_share_mem where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and not exists(select null from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
